name: Strawberry Ice Cream Pie...vxrf36b
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Fudge topping, not too thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Process cookies in a food processor or blender until finely crumbled. Add butter, cinnamon, and ginger; process to combine well. Turn the mixture into a 9-inch pie plate. Place the crust in the freezer for 10 minutes.
2. Scoop ice cream into balls and place on top of the prepared crust. Put the pie in the freezer until ready to serve (up to 2 days).
3. Warm the fudge topping in a microwave-safe bowl for 20-30 seconds until just warm. Drizzle the topping over the pie using the tip of a teaspoon, creating a random pattern. Decorate with chocolate-dipped strawberries if desired. Makes 10 to 12 servings.
